callout.p: 补图：当前 Artifact 与 Workspace 同步是 runtime 内部能力，不是独立 API 资源模型。Docker 走 host workspace，E2B 走 host 到 sandbox、sandbox 到 host 的双向同步；最终由 artifacts API 提供列表和下载。

whiteboard: flowchart LR Session[Session] -- ensureSessionRuntime --> Runtime{Runtime Provider} Runtime -- type=docker --> HostWs[Host workspace directory] Runtime -- type=e2b --> E2BSandbox[E2B sandbox] HostWs -- initial copy --> E2BSandbox E2BSandbox -- changed files --> HostWs HostWs -- scan --> ArtifactIndex[Artifact Index] API[Express API] -- GET /v1/artifacts --> ArtifactIndex API -- GET /v1/sessions/{id}/artifacts/*path/download --> HostWs UI[Console Artifacts View] -- list/download --> API
